heading_content_part: developer- Do not collect any information- Do not require unnecessary permissions- Display ads using Google AdMob platform that may collect certain information from apps
Net Blocker app- Only sets up a local VPN interface to be able to block the network traffic of apps without root- Does not connect to a remote server to steal your privacy data
DNS Changer app- Only sets up a local VPN interface to be able to change DNS server addresses without root- Does not connect to a remote server to steal your privacy data
